state: The PR branch is suitable for draft human review as Phase 6 governance and reproducibility evidence. It is not suitable for operational readiness, paper readiness, merge-as-ready, or official promotion because honest DSR remains 0.0 and official CVaR has zero exposure.
top_satisfactory: Clean regeneration is proven in an isolated clean clone/equivalent with clean Phase5 restore PASS/advance.
Official Phase4 artifacts and research baseline artifacts are present and hashed in the latest Phase6 gate pack.
Source-doc-artifact alignment is ALIGNED for the Phase4-R4 source/documentation mismatch.
Phase5 sovereign closure restore remains the correct research-only baseline with EXACT_RESTORE evidence.
Governance boundaries are preserved: PR is draft, no merge, no official promotion, no A3/A4 reopen, RiskLabAI remains oracle/shadow.
top_gaps: dsr_honest=0.0 and dsr_passed=false block any promotion or readiness claim.
Official CVaR is PASS_ZERO_EXPOSURE with positions={} and total_exposure_pct=0.0, so economic robustness is not proven.
Cross-sectional remains ALIVE_BUT_NOT_PROMOTABLE and cannot be treated as official.
Phase7 paper/testnet readiness cannot start from this evidence because DSR and CVaR blockers remain.
PR #1 remains draft governance/reproducibility evidence and still requires human review before any branch-level decision.
top_risks: Confusing reproducibility proof with quantitative merit.
Treating PASS_ZERO_EXPOSURE as real CVaR robustness.
Using the PR draft as merge/readiness approval.
Reopening A3/A4 without strong new evidence.
Promoting research artifacts to official by convenience.
must_not_reopen: Any promotion path while honest DSR remains 0.0
resolved_since_previous_global_audit: Phase4 official artifact presence and hashes were established.
Phase4 research baseline artifact presence and hashes were established.
Source-doc alignment moved from divergent to ALIGNED.
Clean regeneration moved from inconclusive to proven in clean clone/equivalent.
CVaR artifact was persisted with explicit zero-exposure caveat.

stabilization_triage.reason: Superseded autonomous stop-review snapshot contradicted later Phase6 evidence; do not commit these scratch files.

next_step.objective: Review PR #1 as a draft governance/reproducibility PR, preserve blockers, and decide whether to keep it open, request documentation-only changes, or freeze the line.

Do not treat ALIVE_BUT_NOT_PROMOTABLE as promotable.
